label: toolkit:roraustCoverage
title: Number of Australian Institutions with a ROR id
description: This query calculates the potential number of Australian research organizations that could be represented in ROR by identifying all Australian organizations that have authored publications between 2020 and 2024.

label: toolkit:roraustaffiliaitons
title: Directly asserted affiliations by year for Australian institutions
description: This query measures the direct adoption of ROR identifiers by publishers for Australian affiliations, counting the number of times a ROR ID has been explicitly included in Crossref metadata.

label: toolkit:roraustaffiliaitonsPublisher
title: Support for ROR ids is concentrated in specific publishers
description: This query identifies which publishers are actively asserting ROR IDs for Australian affiliations in their publication metadata.

label: toolkit:assertionsbyFieldOfResearch
title: Asserted Australian affiliations by field of research
description: This query analyzes the uptake of ROR assertions across different fields of research, comparing Crossref assertions to total Australian publications in Dimensions.

label: toolkit:DataCiteRORAffiliations
title: ROR Assertions in DataCite records 2020-2024
description: This query assesses the adoption of ROR identifiers in non-publication outputs registered in DataCite (datasets, software, etc.).

label: toolkit:ROR_DataCite_affiliations_repositories
title: Compare ROR-based affiliations (Australian vs global assertions)
description: This query identifies which DataCite repositories are likely associated with specific Australian institutions by analyzing ROR affiliations.

label: toolkit:number_RAIDS
title: Number of RAiDs created as at January 2025
description: This query counts the number of registered Research Activity IDs (RAiDs) to measure the initial uptake of the identifier.

label: toolkit:grantsinCrossrefdirect
title: Grant DOIs registered in Crossref by funder
description: This query assesses the current state of grant registration in Crossref, counting grant DOIs per funder and analyzing metadata richness.

label: toolkit:grantCount
title: Total pool of active Australian grants
description: This query estimates the total pool of active Australian grants to provide a baseline for PID adoption using Dimensions.

label: toolkit:AutralianPubGrants
title: Percentage of publications with valid grant IDs in funding metadata
description: This query compares two methods of linking publications to grants: structured Crossref metadata versus text mining of acknowledgements in Dimensions.

label: toolkit:FacilitiesInROR
title: Australian research facilities registered in ROR
description: This query provides a count of how many Australian research facilities are registered in ROR.

label: toolkit:facilityAssertionsalgo
title: Facility Assertions 2020-2024
description: This query measures the research output of Australian facilities by algorithmically linking publications to them based on author affiliations.

label: toolkit:FacilitiesDirectlyAsserted
title: Facilities directly asserted vs algorithmically linked
description: This query compares publications linked to facilities via direct ROR assertions in Crossref versus algorithmic linking in Dimensions.

label: toolkit:DataCitedatasetsOverview
title: Australian repository landscape in DataCite
description: This comprehensive query maps the Australian repository landscape within DataCite using ROR affiliations, provider country codes, and domain name analysis.

label: toolkit:re3data
title: PID systems in use as registered in re3data
description: This query inspects re3data.org data to identify which persistent identifier systems are reportedly used by Australian repositories.

label: toolkit:countryRepositoryOutput
title: Repository outputs by country 2020-2024
description: This query aggregates DataCite repository outputs by country to rank national contributions.

label: toolkit:repositorydetails
title: Repository details and PID adoption metrics
description: This query provides a detailed profile for each DataCite repository including country, institutional owner, and key PID metrics.

label: toolkit:globaldatacitationrates
title: Global data citation rates 2024
description: This query measures the rate of dataset citation in scholarly articles by field of research.

label: toolkit:datacitationCountry
title: Data citation percentage by country
description: This query breaks down dataset citation rate by country and field of research for international comparison.

label: toolkit:datacitationComparativeEnagement
title: Data citation comparative engagement
description: This query calculates a comparative engagement ratio for data citation by country and field.

label: toolkit:percentageAustralianSamplesByYear
title: Australian IGSN samples by year
description: This query measures Australia's contribution to global registration of physical samples using IGSN.

label: toolkit:igsnpersonAffiliationlinks
title: Affiliation and person linkages in Australian IGSN records
description: This query assesses metadata richness of Australian IGSN records by measuring links to people (ORCID) and organizations (ROR).

label: toolkit:igsnobjectlinks
title: Object relationships in Australian IGSN records
description: This query analyzes how well IGSN sample records are linked to other research objects (e.g., IsCitedBy, IsSupplementTo).

label: toolkit:linkedIdentifiers
title: IGSN linked identifiers analysis
description: This query assesses metadata richness of Australian IGSN records, measuring integration into the wider PID graph.

label: toolkit:instuments
title: Research instruments registered in DataCite
description: This query identifies and counts research instruments registered with a persistent identifier in DataCite.

label: toolkit:institutionsROR
title: Links between instruments and affiliations
description: This query examines metadata of registered instruments from key Australian repositories for PID graph connectivity.

label: toolkit:instrumentLinks
title: Links between instruments and DataCite records
description: This query measures the reuse or citation of registered instruments within the DataCite ecosystem.

label: toolkit:instrumentcitations
title: Instrument citations in scholarly publications
description: This query identifies when registered instruments are cited in the full text of scholarly publications.

label: toolkit:reports
title: Reports by repository
description: This query identifies and ranks repositories based on the number of research reports registered in DataCite.

label: toolkit:reportsOCRIDROR
title: Reports interoperability with ORCID and ROR
description: This query assesses metadata quality of research reports from Australian repositories for ORCID and ROR linkage.

label: toolkit:reportcitations
title: Report citations and altmetric impact
description: This query measures the impact of reports from Australian repositories through formal citations and Altmetric mentions.

label: toolkit:protocolsByYearDimensions
title: Articles published in protocol journals by year
description: This query tracks the volume of protocol-focused articles published over time.

label: toolkit:protocolJournals
title: Protocol journals ranked by volume
description: This query identifies the primary venues for publishing research protocols.

label: toolkit:ProtocolsDataCite
title: Protocols registered in DataCite
description: This query searches for protocols registered in DataCite, categorized by repository and resource type.

label: toolkit:ntrOutputs
title: Non-Traditional Research Outputs in DataCite
description: This query measures Australia's output of NTROs (Image, Audiovisual, Software, etc.) in DataCite and their citation rates.

label: toolkit:ntrZendoOutputs
title: Software works linked to Australian researchers via ORCID
description: This query identifies Software works based on ORCID assertions linked to Australian researchers.

label: toolkit:ntrLocalContexts
title: Local Contexts labels and rights in DataCite
description: This query identifies Local Contexts labels and rights associated with works in DataCite.

label: toolkit:dissertationsCountryandRepository
title: Dissertations by repository and country
description: This query provides a comprehensive count of dissertations with PIDs by combining DataCite and Crossref data.

label: toolkit:DissertationsORCIDROR
title: Australian dissertations interoperability with ROR and ORCID
description: This query measures metadata completeness of Australian dissertations in DataCite for ORCID and ROR identifiers.

label: toolkit:noORCIDnoPidOverTime
title: Global works with no PID in ORCID by year
description: This query identifies research outputs in ORCID that lack a standard persistent identifier, tracked over time.

label: toolkit:noORCIDnoPidOverTimeAU
title: Australian works with no PID in ORCID by year
description: Filtered to Australian researchers, providing a national view of outputs recorded without persistent identifiers.

label: toolkit:dblpConferences2024
title: DBLP conference papers and DOI coverage 2024
description: This query counts conference papers by conference in 2024 and reports how many have a DOI.

label: toolkit:FORpubtype
title: Works reported in 2024 with no PID by Field of Research
description: This query provides a granular analysis of outputs lacking PIDs in Australian researchers' ORCID records by field and work type.

label: toolkit:OAratio
title: Open Access ratio for Australian research
description: This query measures the percentage of Australian research articles that are Open Access, tracking the trend year over year.
